transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Willowbrook Care Navigation, this is Ava. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I need to reschedule my appointment with Dr. Patel. It's this Thursday.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sure, I can help with that. Can I get your name and date of birth to pull up your file?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks, Maria. I see your appointment Thursday at 2:15pm with Dr. Patel for a follow-up. What day works better for you?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Could we do sometime next Monday instead? Morning if possible.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Let me check. I have Monday the 14th at 9:30am open with Dr. Patel.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Perfect, I've moved your appointment to Monday the 14th at 9:30am. You'll get a text confirmation shortly.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Anytime, Maria. Is there anything else I can help with today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: No, that's all. Thanks so much.
